rationale: Round-1 approver re-check: the fix delta introduces no coverage regression. The requirement->bead map and work_chunks frontmatter are unchanged (R9->B1; R1-R5,R3b,R8->B2; R6,R7->B3); every Provenance row still points at an existing check; Bead 2 stays at 6 steps. All FOUR spec-approval carry-forwards remain intact and three are strengthened (exact-set + positive enumeration, canonical all-fields value fidelity, dynamic-construction now subsumed). The hardening additions all stay inside R2-R5's remit: buildCommand implements R5's structural allowlist, the read-only sandbox pin keeps exactly four commands while making R3's 'codex never writes' sandbox-enforced, the one-object parse rule refines R3 and closes a laundering path, input hardening is defensive implementation of R2 (mirrors 110's slug contract, guard-style per cited ADR-0035, not a new authoring surface), and the corrected schema-option claim explicitly keeps panel verify authoritative so the 'no platform output-schema guarantee' Non-Goal holds. No 112 consumption introduced; Non-Goals/Out-of-Scope respected. No scope creep beyond the approved spec.
findings: NO REGRESSION (mapping): requirement->bead map (301-312) and work_chunks frontmatter identical to round 1; Bead 2 remains 6 steps (<=7); all 10 spec ACs + both Validation Proofs still traced in the Provenance table (834-849) to checks that exist.

AC4 float-satisfaction preserved: Bead 2 verification (608) now greps the fuller 'codex exec --sandbox read-only --skip-git-repo-check', a floor-raise that still satisfies the spec's literal AC4 (grep -qF 'codex exec' matches the substring); mindspec complete still absent. No spec AC dropped or under-delivered.

Carry-forward #1 (exact-set) intact + strengthened: TestMsPanelWorkflow_AllowedCLIExactSet (178-204, 563-591) still asserts set-equality to exactly four (fourth element now the sandboxed codex form), plus a positive enumeration of every mindspec-/codex-bearing literal and a buildCommand single-chokepoint routing proof.

Carry-forward #2 (value fidelity) intact + strengthened: Manual e2e scenario 2 (631) now decodes both attempts canonically as JSON and compares verdict/hard_block/concrete_changes_required (all gate-relevant fields), not just reviewer_id.

Carry-forward #3 (dynamic-construction indirection) intact: the three-form blocklist is subsumed by the positive-enumeration check (188-204, 570-591) - a single-quoted fragment, backtick template, or smuggled verb all fail by set non-membership without pattern anticipation.
Carry-forward #4 (../../adr/ link) intact: still dispositioned no-plan-action (817-821).

REMIT — sandbox pin: 'codex exec --sandbox read-only --skip-git-repo-check' is the same codex command with mandatory safety flags, NOT a fifth command; count stays four (R5 honored) and it makes R3/R3b's 'codex never writes files' sandbox-enforced rather than prompt-only. Within R3+R5.

REMIT — one-object parse rule (493-498, scenario 4): refines R3's definition of a parse failure (multi-object/narrative stdout routes into the same ladder) and actively closes an anti-laundering path the spec's R3 falsified clause targets. Within R3.

REMIT — input hardening (384-394, e2e scenario 7): closest-to-the-line addition, but it is defensive implementation of R2's command construction (mirrors 110's slug-validation contract the workflow sits behind), guard-style per the spec-cited ADR-0035, and is proven only via the Manual e2e - NOT promoted to a new spec-level AC or a new authoring/decision surface. Not scope creep.

REMIT — schema option (140-149, 476-484, 800-815): the plan corrects the docs claim but explicitly states schema governs only the agent step's in-memory return and mindspec panel verify remains the authoritative on-disk check - so the spec Non-Goal 'no claim of a platform output-schema guarantee' is preserved, not violated. pipeline() is an implementation of R3 fan-out. Within remit.

NO 112 creep: the 112 boundary section (783-787) is unchanged ('111 reads none of 112's new symbols'); every hardening addition is workflow-internal JS/test/e2e or mirrors 110, consuming only 109/110 surfaces. Non-Goals + Out-of-Scope all still respected (no complete, no consolidation, no config mutation, skills-path retained, external stub, no signing).
